brief: Convert a ComponentSpec into a React implementation plan that honors JSX or TSX preference, keeps reusable UI out of the data layer, and gives memoization advice only when justified.

requiredSignals.description: The plan reads the React implementation target.
The plan preserves the configured JSX or TSX code format.
Props model is present before code planning.
UI/data boundary prevents data-layer leakage into reusable UI components.
Shared UI does not import fetchers, service clients, or raw API data.
Memoization is judged case by case rather than applied by blanket rule.
